libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime tests on JDK 25, configure the native test runtime with system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`. Meaningful WebClient coverage can use an in-process Vert.x `HttpServer`; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If tests choose to exercise `OAuth2WebClient`, that API references the optional `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2` dependency; core WebClient, forms, multipart, redirects, sessions, caching, and JSON coverage do not require it.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative for whether the Netty Java 25 system properties are still sufficient.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 resolves to Vert.x Core/Netty 4.2.2.Final; Netty 4.2 disables sun.misc.Unsafe by default on Java 25 unless explicitly allowed, matching the existing 5.0.0 native-test setup.
